overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Hogwarts Legacy showing a wizard character in green robes walking through a stone gateway toward Hogwarts castle. The character passes through iron gates, walks along a cobblestone path with the castle coming into view, stops briefly to look around at the scenic grounds, then continues walking toward distant figures near the castle.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone gateway entrance with iron gates

events.description: another wizard in dark robes walks past on the left in the opposite direction
passing through the iron wrought gates, exiting the enclosed gateway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the stone gateway in a green wizard robe and pointed hat

notable_agents.action: wizard in dark robes walking briskly in the opposite direction past the ego character

entered.detail: tall stone pillars flanking the entrance gate with ornate lanterns on top
black iron gates that open as the character approaches
moss-covered stone walls lining the path
large gothic castle with multiple spires becoming visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a stone gateway flanked by walls and tall trees. Another wizard passes by in the opposite direction. The character proceeds through opening iron wrought gates as Hogwarts castle comes into view in the misty distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: cobblestone path leading to castle with scenic valley views

events.description: character stops walking and pans the camera to look around at the castle and surroundings

agents.ego_description: walking down the path toward the castle, then stopping to pan the camera and admire the view

entered.detail: stone benches placed along the sides of the path
black iron lampposts with glass enclosures lining the pathway
open green valley with the castle situated on the far side

segments.scene_description: The path opens into a wide valley with Hogwarts castle dominating the view ahead. The character walks along the cobblestone path lined with benches and lampposts, then stops to pan the camera and take in the scenic view of the castle and surrounding mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding lakeside path approaching castle grounds

events.description: distant figures become visible walking on the path ahead near the castle

agents.ego_description: continuing down the cobblestone path toward distant figures near the castle entrance

notable_agents.action: distant wizards walking along the path toward the castle entrance

entered.detail: calm water of the Black Lake visible to the left of the path
dense pine and evergreen trees on the right side of the path
small group of figures walking on the path ahead near the castle

segments.scene_description: The character resumes walking along the winding path with the castle now visible to the left across the lake. The path is lined with stone walls and benches, with dense evergreen trees on the right. Distant figures can be seen walking ahead toward the castle entrance as the character continues the approach.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow stone gateway that gradually opens into a sweeping vista of the Hogwarts castle grounds. It begins as the character walks between stone walls and tall trees, passing another wizard before proceeding through wrought iron gates that reveal the castle shrouded in a misty distance. As the path expands into a wide valley, the camera follows the character along a cobblestone walkway lined with benches and lampposts, pausing briefly to pan across the dominating castle and the surrounding mountains. The scene then shifts as the character resumes their walk along a winding path, with the castle now positioned to the left across a lake and dense evergreen trees bordering the right. Finally, the camera continues its approach toward the castle entrance, following the path toward distant figures walking ahead.
